<?php /** * Null cache object to use when no caching is on. */ class HTMLPurifier_DefinitionCache_Null extends HTMLPurifier_DefinitionCache { /** * @param HTMLPurifier_Definition $def * @param HTMLPurifier_Config $config * @return bool */ public function add($def, $config) { return false; } /** * @param HTMLPurifier_Definition $def * @param HTMLPurifier_Config $config * @return bool */ public function set($def, $config) { return false; } /** * @param HTMLPurifier_Definition $def * @param HTMLPurifier_Config $config * @return bool */ public function replace($def, $config) { return false; } /** * @param HTMLPurifier_Config $config * @return bool */ public function remove($config) { return false; } /** * @param HTMLPurifier_Config $config * @return bool */ public function get($config) { return false; } /** * @param HTMLPurifier_Config $config * @return bool */ public function flush($config) { return false; } /** * @param HTMLPurifier_Config $config * @return bool */ public function cleanup($config) { return false; } } // vim: et sw=4 sts=4
